_comment: Real profile for Mahathir Mohammad — Executive Single-Page ATS Edition.
name: Mahathir Mohammad
summary: Full Stack JavaScript Developer with hands-on experience architecting and deploying responsive web applications using the MERN stack (React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB). Proven track record of developing scalable SaaS platforms, e-commerce applications, and role-based administrative dashboards. Passionate about writing clean, maintainable code, implementing secure authentication, and optimizing frontend performance for high user engagement.

projects.name: FoodFlow — Food Sharing & Surplus Reduction Platform
projects.technologies: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Firebase Authentication
bullets: Architected a full-stack web application connecting surplus food donors with community organizations to eliminate local food waste.
Engineered real-time request tracking, food availability listings, and secure user authentication with fine-grained access permissions.
Designed fully responsive user interfaces optimized for mobile and desktop devices, achieving fast page render times and smooth user flows.

projects.name: Blood Donation Application (SaaS Platform)
projects.technologies: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Firebase Authentication
bullets: Implemented role-based dashboards for donors, volunteers, and administrators, establishing secure multi-tier access control across the system.
Built robust token-based authentication and authorization using Firebase, protecting sensitive user medical data and private API endpoints.
Developed full-stack RESTful APIs handling emergency donation requests, automated volunteer dispatch coordination, and admin management.

projects.name: Volans Clothing — E-Commerce Web Application
projects.technologies: Next.js 15, JavaScript, MongoDB, NextAuth.js, GSAP, Tailwind CSS
bullets: Leveraged Next.js 15 App Router to build a modern multi-page architecture with server-side rendering (SSR) for enhanced SEO and performance.
Integrated NextAuth.js credentials provider to manage secure customer authentication, shopping cart state, and session persistence.
Developed a comprehensive Admin Dashboard for secure product inventory control, catalog management, and real-time customer order processing.

projects.name: Community Cleanliness & Camp Management Platform
projects.technologies: React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Firebase Authentication
bullets: Created an interactive event management platform for organizing and tracking community environmental cleanliness campaigns.
Designed intuitive reporting workflows allowing volunteers to log activity, upload field updates, and view regional impact metrics.
Optimized client-side rendering and component state management for cross-browser reliability and low network latency.
